_INFO: This file holds info / configs for the bot, such as status message IDs and other.

statuses.message: Watching general chat for sillies and rule breakers
I'm hungy. Pls give me ram :3
"I'm so done with being a little possessed"
"So sing along! It's such a silly song!"
"Here comes the sun, dododo. Here comes the sun and I say.."
"It could be tomorrow, it could be todayy"
"I hope I said I love you enough~"
"I think they see me as infamous"
"Rip and tear.. until it is done."
"The only thing they fear is you."
Toccata and Fugue in D minor but metal is my favorite song
"Can you run Doom?" ..don't try me, of course I can play doom! Doom can be played on anything!
Imagine going through your yearbook and seeing someone's song is a furry song.. and what they said is "Hopefully I'm not kidnapped or held hostage.". xD
